diff:
diff --git a/reconcile/mapping.py b/reconcile/mapping.py
--- a/reconcile/mapping.py
+++ b/reconcile/mapping.py
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ def map_product_tier(legacy_code):
     tier = LEGACY_TIERS.get(legacy_code[:2])
-    if tier is None:
-        return "STANDARD"
+    if tier is None:
+        raise MappingError(f"unmapped legacy product code {legacy_code}")
     return tier
diff --git a/reconcile/rounding.py b/reconcile/rounding.py
--- a/reconcile/rounding.py
+++ b/reconcile/rounding.py
@@ -9,4 +9,4 @@ def recompute_interest(balance, rate, days):
     accrued = balance * rate * days / DAYS_IN_YEAR
-    return round(accrued, 2)
+    return accrued.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_EVEN)
diff --git a/reconcile/currencies.py b/reconcile/currencies.py
--- a/reconcile/currencies.py
+++ b/reconcile/currencies.py
@@ -12,5 +12,6 @@ def normalize_currency(code):
     code = code.strip().upper()
+    code = LEGACY_CURRENCY_ALIASES.get(code, code)
     if code not in ISO_4217:
-        return code
+        raise CurrencyError(f"unknown currency code {code}")
     return code
